title: Progressive Disclosure, References, Scripts, and Assets · Skill Brief: Reference Design
summary: Refactor an oversized skill into a compact router and focused resources. Planned artifact: Add and verify the agent ext reference design increment in a progressively disclosed skill package. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Organize authoritative references by decision point and expected use.
Keep SKILL.md complete but route variant details to named resources.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Build Reference Design evidence
steps.instruction: Append a agent-ext-reference-design-1vjbwz: manifest entry with concrete verify plus failure, owner, or repair evidence.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Reference Design into observable performance evidence.

agent-ext-reference-design-1vjbwz:
  verify: [replace with a deterministic check]
  failure: [replace with the rejected condition]
  repair: [replace with a local reproduction and correction path]

steps.title: Defend the Reference Design model
steps.instruction: Write a concise evidence note that explains when Reference Design applies, what can fail, and how the changed case was verified.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide.
